name.label: Name
name.description: An optional label shown on the node in the editor.

method.label: Method
method.description: The HTTP method to use; `use` reads it from msg.method at runtime.

url.label: URL
url.description: The request URL; supports {{mustache}} tags against the message.

paytoqs.label: Payload
paytoqs.description: How msg.payload is sent: ignored, appended to the query string, or as the request body.

headers.label: Headers
headers.description: Static request headers, merged with msg.headers.

ret.label: Return
ret.description: The shape of the response body: a UTF-8 string, a binary buffer, or parsed JSON.

authType.label: Authentication
authType.description: The authentication scheme used for the request.

persist.label: Keep the connection alive
persist.description: Keeps the TCP connection alive between requests.

senderr.label: Send request errors to the output
senderr.description: Sends request errors to the output instead of failing the node.

insecureHTTPParser.label: Enable insecure HTTP parser
insecureHTTPParser.description: Accepts malformed HTTP responses using an insecure parser.

input.label: Request
input.description: The request to send. msg.method, msg.url, msg.headers, and msg.payload override the configured values at runtime.

response.label: Response
response.description: The HTTP response: status code, headers, and the body as a string, a binary buffer, or parsed JSON.
